zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Wills於大約1505年出生在英國戴文普萊姆斯時，她的父親John Wills26歲，母親Amris Dawbney22歲。她於大約1520年與Sir John Downe在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1599年在英國可瓦爾雷達盧斯享年95歲。

zh-hans.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾武特金頓
zh-hans.Alstone, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾阿爾斯同
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Wills于大约1505年出生在英国戴文普萊姆斯时，她的父亲John Wills26岁，母亲Amris Dawbney22岁。她于大约1520年与Sir John Downe在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1599年在英国可瓦爾雷達盧斯享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wills
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: variant of Will with genitival -s.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Wills was born about 1505, in Plymouth, Devon, England, her father, John Wills, was 26 and her mother, Amris Dawbney, was 22. She married Sir John Downe about 1520, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1599, in Redruth, Cornwall, England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Wills est née environ 1505, à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Wills, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Amris Dawbney, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Downe environ 1520, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1599, à Redruth, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Wills um 1505 in Plymouth, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wills 26 und ihre Mutter Amris Dawbney 22. Sie hat um 1520 in Devon, England Sir John Downe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1599 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Redruth, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Wills è nata il circa 1505 nel Plymouth, Devon, England, sua padre, John Wills, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Amris Dawbney, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Downe circa 1520, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1599, nel Redruth, Cornwall, England, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Willsが約1505年にイギリスデボンプリモウスで生まれた時，父John Willsは26歳，母Amris Dawbneyは22歳であった。約1520年にイギリスデボンでSir John Downeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1599年にイギリスコルンワルレドルスで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Wills(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 데폰 플림우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wills(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amris Dawbney(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 영국 데폰에서 Sir John Downe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 영국 코른월 레드루스에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Wills nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wills, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Amris Dawbney, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Downe aproximadamente 1520, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1599, em Redruth, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Wills родилась около 1505 г. в местности плимоут, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Wills было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Amris Dawbney, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Downe около 1520 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1599 г. в местности редрут, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Wills nació aproximadamente 1505, en Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Wills, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Amris Dawbney, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir John Downe aproximadamente 1520, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1599, en Redruth, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años.
